productDisplayName: Asics Women Gel Cushioning White Pink Shoe
description: CompositionWhite and pink reflective running shoes with removable sockliner, California slip lasting, sole with trusstic system, rear foot cushion and high abrasion rubberWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drier Avoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in sunlight FittingRegularMade for that comfortable running experience, these lightweight shoes from asics have a removable sockliner that can accommodate a medical orthotic. While the California slip lasting ensures stability and comfort, the upper is stitched around the EVA board and directly attached to the midsole, enhancing durability. The GEL cushioning attenuates shock during impact phase and allows for a smooth transition to midstance, while the trusstic system reduces the weight of the sole unit while retaining the structural integrity of the shoe. It&rsquo s reflective properties makes it a safe use even in low light, and the high abrasion rubber(AHAR) placed in critical areas of the outsole ensures durability.
